response.justification: Candidate is dramatically overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of fullstack experience including Staff/Senior titles and strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS exposure. Technical fit is excellent, but level mismatch and Berlin on-site requirement vs. recent career gap raise concerns about retention and salary expectations. Worth a screening call to clarify motivation and compensation alignment.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS experience directly matching the stack
Berlin-based, fits the high on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated fullstack range from database to UI across many domains
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior background vs. entry-level posting risks dissatisfaction and attrition
No PostgreSQL listed (MongoDB/MySQL instead) and no Nest.js experience
Recent career gap and short tenure at last role may signal availability or commitment uncertainty
